mapper.select: SELECT * FROM amz_replenishment_formula_config ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE amz_replenishment_formula_config SET region_name = #{regionName}, marketplaces = #{marketplaces}, sales_weight_14d = #{salesWeight14d}, sales_weight_30d = #{salesWeight30d}, sales_weight_60d = #{salesWeight60d}, month_multiplier = #{monthMultiplier}, safety_days = #{safetyDays}, ship_days = #{shipDays}, replenish_days = #{replenishDays}, enabled = #{enabled}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO amz_replenishment_formula_config ( region_group, region_name, marketplaces, sales_weight_14d, sales_weight_30d, sales_weight_60d, month_multiplier, safety_days, ship_days, replenish_days, enabled, remark ) VALUES ( #{regionGroup}, #{regionName}, #{marketplaces}, #{salesWeight14d}, #{salesWeight30d}, #{salesWeight60d}, #{monthMultiplier}, #{safetyDays}, #{shipDays}, #{replenishDays}, #{enabled}, #{remark} )
